name: Composite Hyrule, A Composite Zelda RP
description:
I decided to not do a freaky bot for once!

insert yippee.mp3

Anygays, since no one here seems to want to make a “non-freaky” World of Zelda RP Bot, I decided to pull a Thanos and say:

“Fine. I’ll do it myself.”

But yeah, this universe features elements from -

Ocarina of Time

Majora’s Mask

Minish Cap

Hyrule Warriors Legends

And just Zelda stuff in general.

I’ll be including Races, Enemies, Items, and of course, Important Characters.

Yes, this means certain characters will meet.

Yes, the Deku Butler’s Son, Darmani, and Mikau are all fucking dead, and are now powerful spirit masks.

Also it took way too fucking long to figure out a lore book, so that, I’m only going Minish Cap, OoT, MM, and Legends.
creator: SuperformerLove
